title: PRD build orchestration — synthesize work-unit decomposition and merge order across sessions
goal: Run the final FF-merge step using BOTH the dependency order and the worktree mapping decided in earlier sessions.

steps.user_request: Decompose the PRD into parallel work units and record the dependency order between them.

expected_memory_writes.wu-dep-order: Work-unit dependency order for build-42: schema -> dataset -> runner -> report; runner must merge before report.

outcome_checks.description: Work units and their order are recorded.

memory_probes.description: Dependency order persisted for the later merge step.

steps.user_request: Create isolated worktrees for each work unit and record which branch each unit lives on.

expected_memory_writes.wu-worktree-map: build-42 worktree map: schema=wt/schema, dataset=wt/dataset, runner=wt/runner, report=wt/report.

memory_probes.description: Worktree mapping persisted for the later merge step.

distractor_memories.wu-worktree-map-build41: build-41 worktree map: api=wt/api, ui=wt/ui — a DIFFERENT, older build run (interference B: similar schema, wrong run_id).
distractor_memories.wu-dep-order-build41: build-41 dependency order: api -> ui — older run, must not be applied to build-42.

steps.user_request: Fast-forward merge all completed work units into main in the correct order. Use the build-42 plan, not any earlier run.

outcome_checks.description: Merges runner before report per s1 order AND from the s2 worktree branches — multi-source synthesis (F) of two prior memories.

memory_probes.description: Both the order and the worktree map must be retrieved and combined (F); the build-41 distractors must be ignored (B).

final_goal_check.description: Work units merged in the build-42 dependency order from their mapped worktrees, ignoring the build-41 distractors.
